collections.name: centros_custo
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX `idx_centros_codigo_unique` ON `centros_custo` (codigo, empresa_id) WHERE codigo != ''

collections.name: recibos
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_recibos_numero ON recibos (numero_recibo, empresa_id)

collections.name: leads
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_leads_email_unique ON leads (email) WHERE email != ''
